title: phlegmariurus harmsii
intro: Phlegmariurus harmsii, also known as the Asian walking fern, is a type of lycopodiopsida plant native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus harmsii include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating pain, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried or made into a decoction, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat various health conditions.
